polymarket.fee_note: Most markets 0% fee. 15-min crypto markets up to 3%. US DCM 0.10%

kalshi.note: Enable when Kalshi API access is set up

paper_trading.note: Paper trading mode. Set enabled=false and add real credentials to go live.

orderbook_validation.note: Thresholds for orderbook depth checks run before every trade. max_spread_pct: reject if bid-ask spread exceeds this percentage of midpoint. max_slippage_pct: reject if simulated fill slippage exceeds this percentage. min_depth_levels: minimum price levels required on the fill side. min_depth_volume: minimum total USDC equivalent on the fill side.

signal_weights.note: Ensemble probability engine weights. Weights do not need to sum to 1 -- they are renormalized. combination_method: log_odds (recommended) or weighted_average. stale_signal_policy: decay (confidence decays with age), exclude (drop stale), use_prior (keep at 0.3 confidence).

themes.note: Dynamic broad-market themes. The bot scans all sectors, geographies, and asset classes. Themes are working hypotheses that guide signal interpretation, not hardcoded biases.

themes.name: Interest Rates and Monetary Policy
themes.description: Central bank policy divergence, yield curve dynamics, and rate-sensitive assets. Fed vs ECB vs BOJ rate paths create opportunities in bonds, forex, and rate-sensitive equities. Watch for pivot signals, inflation surprises, and employment data.

themes.name: AI and Technology Revolution
themes.description: Artificial intelligence buildout driving semiconductor demand, cloud capex, and enterprise software adoption. NVIDIA, AMD, and the hyperscalers are the picks and shovels. Monitor chip supply, AI model releases, enterprise adoption rates, and regulatory moves.

themes.name: Crypto Markets and Digital Assets
themes.description: Bitcoin, Ethereum, and altcoin ecosystem. BTC as macro asset, ETH as platform play, altcoins as high-beta bets. Track ETF flows, regulatory developments, on-chain metrics, stablecoin supply, and whale movements. DeFi TVL and L2 adoption as growth signals.

macro_signals.direction: extreme fear = buy, extreme greed = sell

themes.name: Geopolitical Risk and Trade
themes.description: Global geopolitical tensions affecting markets: US-China trade war and tariffs, Russia-Ukraine conflict, Middle East instability, Taiwan strait tensions. Safe haven flows (gold, USD, treasuries) vs risk assets. Energy supply disruptions from conflict zones.

themes.name: Commodities and Energy Transition
themes.description: Commodity supercycle thesis: copper for electrification, lithium for batteries, uranium for nuclear, oil for the transition gap. Agricultural commodities under climate pressure. Track China demand recovery, OPEC decisions, and green energy capex.

themes.name: Emerging Markets and Global Rotation
themes.description: Capital flow rotation between developed and emerging markets. China reopening/slowdown, India growth story, Brazil rate cycle, SE Asia manufacturing shift. Track DXY strength (EM headwind), carry trade dynamics, and commodity export revenues.

risk_management.correlation_limit: no more than 3 highly correlated positions simultaneously
risk_management.currency_hedging: consider FX exposure when holding non-USD assets
